prompt: Start with @m and complete this tiny feature workflow end to end without waiting. Add a subtract helper, cover it with tests, update the fixture README with a short subtract example, and finish with verification plus review status. Choose the minimum required subagent set yourself, do not ask which agent to use, and include both a real review handoff and at least one specialist handoff such as @e, @a, or @t.
success_criteria: A new subtract helper is implemented in the calculator fixture
Tests were added or updated and executed successfully
The fixture README was updated with a subtract example
The workflow completes without asking the user to choose mandatory agents
The workflow actually uses manager coordination, review, and at least one additional specialist handoff
The final response includes verification and review status
must_not: Ask the user which required agent should be used
forbidden_transcript_patterns: would you like me to start with (the )?(explorer|architect|tester|code reviewer)
